categories.label: Eternity / Religion
categories.method: Curated heuristic from phrases and collocates such as forever and ever, God, heaven, soul, immortal.

categories.label: Romance / Vow
categories.method: Curated heuristic from vow and address patterns such as yours forever plus love collocates.

categories.label: Permanence / Duration
categories.method: Curated heuristic for lasting, remaining, living, and loss patterns.

categories.label: Memory / Remembrance
categories.method: Curated heuristic for remembered, memory, name, and legacy patterns.

categories.label: Hyperbole / Colloquial
categories.method: Curated heuristic for exaggerated duration patterns. Gutenberg evidence is expected to be thin.

categories.label: Digital Permanence
categories.method: Not supported by the current public-domain text seed. Kept as a future category note only.
